title: Seventh Year
prose: Seventh year, at last — the one every professor has been threatening you with since first year, and the last one you'll ever spend at Hogwarts. The castle carries the marks of everything it's been through, the way old buildings do, but the Great Hall on the first night looks exactly as it always has: too loud, too bright, entirely too much food.

N.E.W.T.s loom at the far end of the year, distant enough not to worry about yet. For now there's just the ordinary, precious business of one last year in the place that's shaped most of who you've become.

choices.label: Settle in for your final year.
